parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ start: $json.requested_time, event_title: $json.service_type || 'Booking via AI Call', attendee_email: $json.email, attendee_name: $json.customer_name, service_type: $json.service_type, timezone: 'Asia/Manila', notes: 'Booked via Retell AI call. Call ID: ' + $json.call_id }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ event_id: $json.event_id, new_start: $json.requested_time, attendee_email: $json.email, attendee_name: $json.customer_name, service_type: $json.service_type, timezone: 'Asia/Manila', reason_for_change: 'Rescheduled via Retell AI call. Call ID: ' + $json.call_id }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ event_id: $json.event_id, attendee_email: $json.email, attendee_name: $json.customer_name, cancellation_reason: $json.cancellation_reason || 'Cancelled via Retell AI call', timezone: 'Asia/Manila' }) }}
